## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows the conventional commit format
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] No libraries added outside the approved stack
- [ ] No business logic in `PART 7.1`/`§8.2` (recipe deduction, VAT formula, etc.) was modified without explicit sign-off
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the business logic changed
- [ ] Two approvals obtained if this touches authentication, payments, or audit logging
